observed_portfolio_metrics.exploit_mechanism: Targeted interface-balance inflation. Token uses an unbacked value-index layer to simulate a five-figure asset position, masking active underlying native token sweep operations.

audit_observations.security_log: Forensic documentation of an artificial visual position. The rogue implementation utilizes a custom vanity token (BNBM) to inject deceptive high-value display parameters into the compromised wallet dashboard layout.
